findings.resolution: Expected witness projections are literal adapter records and no longer delegate to observed replay.
Fixer pass replaced expected qRoute construction with independent adapter-local literal ReducerRouteEvent records; observed replay paths still use reducer-facing route helpers.
Runtime dispatch uses WeaponMasteryProperty, DragonbornBreathWeaponFacts, and InnateSorcerySpellFacts rather than selected feature or catalog names.
Persistent feature_substrates omit HP, prone, action_available, and bonus_action_available; projections derive those from Combatant and BattleState action-economy owners.

rounds.summary: Fixer pass removed expected-route dependence on shared route helper constructors, verified RAW references for mastery properties, Dragonborn Breath Weapon, Innate Sorcery, and spell save/attack terminology, and confirmed no runtime branch dispatches on authored selected identity.

Convergence pass found no remaining reasonable findings. The remaining strong connascence is the intentional literal route witness duplication between expected adapter records and the copied QNT connector actions they witness.
